response.justification: While Bogdan has strong general software development credentials with 15+ years of experience at senior/staff levels, he lacks critical requirements for this embedded networking security role. Most critically, he does not speak native-level Japanese, a stated required qualification. His expertise is predominantly in web/backend development (JavaScript, TypeScript, DLang) rather than C-based embedded firmware. He shows no evidence of experience with required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption protocols), networking fundamentals (NETCONF, SNMP, switch architecture), or Linux kernel analysis capabilities central to the position.
strengths: Extensive professional experience spanning 15+ years at senior/staff engineering levels across diverse technical domains
Proven Linux and Unix system expertise demonstrated through DevOps infrastructure work, kernel exposure, and embedded systems projects
Strong track record of rapidly acquiring new technical domains and programming languages in professional roles
concerns: Does not possess native-level Japanese language proficiency, a critical stated requirement for the role
Primary expertise is JavaScript/TypeScript/web backend development, not C-based embedded firmware and low-level systems programming
No demonstrable experience with security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption), networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP), or embedded switch firmware development

key_factors.factor: Lack of C and embedded firmware expertise
No security protocols or networking domain background
